reason: The item cleanly targets boundary-aware interpretation of a non-monotonic wind-speed hazard-distance relationship in non-burning venting and the design implications, while explicitly tempting but disallowed transfers to calm-wind dominance and to burning-regime physics. Decoys are largely single-fault and engineering-plausible, and the correct set rewards recognizing both mechanism (advection vs dilution) and perimeter-design risk at intermediate winds. Overall discrimination is strong for experts who must resist monotonic heuristics and regime-transfer extrapolation.
